name: The Turn Golf Sim
about: The Turn Golf Sim is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Owego, NY, featuring The Trackman technology for a premium golfing experience. The venue offers year-round golf access with bookings for one-hour tee times for up to four people, along with options to join skins leagues. Located at 53 South Depot Street, it operates daily from 9:00 am to 11:00 pm, providing a convenient and accessible option for golfers of all skill levels to practice and play on hundreds of virtual courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology delivers accurate and realistic ball tracking
Year-round access to hundreds of courses regardless of weather
Flexible booking options for both individual and group play
Leagues and skins tournaments offer competitive opportunities
Extended hours allow for convenient late-night sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen food available for purchase during sessions
Full bar service available with accepted payment methods including Apple Pay, Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, and JCB

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the most authentic experience, though rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen food available for purchase, with no mention of outside food/drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify exact timing, but one-hour tee times are available for up to four people, suggesting a condensed course play format.

faq.question: Is The Turn kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and allows kids, with mentions of group bookings suitable for all ages.
